title: kamen rider battle royal
description: based off kamen rider and the newest season kamen rider geats
body:
based off the show kamen rider geats

add many item called "id core" and a drivers main one called "desire driver" allowing you to transform into a kamen rider!
rasie buckle allow you to upgrade your rider form giving them new ability

mod also have simple commands so people who not that good with coding can make an addons in seconds to add their own custom rider into the game or rasie buckle


99% of skin made by

https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/robukofu/

 

most of the skin created by 

https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/seanw/

 

thanks to kamen_shadow (discord tag/whatever it now called) for making sure i spelt everything correctly


note:
you do require Kleiders Custom Renderer API to run this (which isn't on modrinth as of right now)
so please download it from curse forge (sorry if this make everything harder)
https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/kleiders-custom-renderer-api

this mod also require pehkui but is playable without it
https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/pehkui
